items.summary: 日记全文检索插件，支持中文分词、BM25搜索、时间衰减排序。适用于喜欢写日记的 OpenClaw 用户，或因 memory-lancedb 插件替换后需要查找日记的场景。

latestVersion.changelog: 添加源代码和 npm 链接，解决安全警告

items.summary: Make real phone calls to your users via Stringclaw voice AI

latestVersion.changelog:
- Added a section on model requirements for voice calls, specifying recommended fast models for natural conversation.
- Instructs users to ensure they are running a sufficiently fast model, or to ask the user to switch if not.
